title: Finite Condition Number Checks

solver_reuse.target: finite matrix condition-number bad bound QF_LRA/Farkas regression seed
solver_reuse.pressure: Exact infinity-norm condition-number replay computes kappa_infinity(A) = 6 for a fixed diagonal matrix while the malformed row claims kappa_infinity(A) <= 5.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional conditioning rows only when they add distinct norm, inverse, singularity, perturbation, or proof-route pressure; keep algorithmic stability and floating-point roundoff in theorem or numerical-honesty lanes.

graduation_criteria: Encode the fixed rational matrix, inverse, matrix infinity norms, condition number, nominal solve, and perturbation response as deterministic exact-rational replay obligations.
Route false finite condition-number bounds through checked QF_LRA/Farkas evidence after replay computes the exact scalar condition number.
Expose the pack through matrix computation, numerical-analysis, and exact-vs-floating learner and consumer query surfaces.

Keep algorithmic stability, singular-value conditioning, pseudospectra, arbitrary-matrix perturbation theorems, and floating-point roundoff marked Lean-horizon or numerical-honesty until formal routes exist.
